instructionsAr: انسخ إجابات Perplexity كـ entries[]. لا حاجة لـ Manus — يكفي Perplexity أو لصق يدوي (source: manual).
perplexityPrompts: What are the best ensemble methods for short-horizon BTC direction prediction with abstention (meta-labeling)? Return JSON only: weightAdjustments object for momentum, ema_cross, mean_reversion, rsi and minDirectionalHitTarget.
Summarize walk-forward validation and triple-barrier labeling for 30-60 second crypto horizons. Return JSON only with weightAdjustments for momentum, order_imbalance, rsi, funding_fade.

Market microstructure signals on Binance futures: funding rate fade, premium momentum, open interest — which combinations reduce false positives? Return JSON weightAdjustments and blockStrategies rules for trend_up regime.
López de Prado meta-labeling for a 17-strategy BTC ensemble: suggest weight priors and minDirectionalHitTarget. JSON only.
Chan vs Murphy regime detection for BTC 1m: suggest when to block mean_reversion in trend. JSON with rules array and weightAdjustments.

entries.notes: استبدل هذا بإجابة Perplexity الحقيقية — يمكنك إضافة entries متعددة.
سؤال Perplexity الثاني — microstructure. احذف هذا المثال إذا لم تلصق بعد.
